known_data_issues_intentionally_included: users: ~0.8% missing home_pincode; fraud rings share device_id + pincode
sessions: ~0.7% missing device; ~1% inconsistent casing in channel; ~0.25% duplicated rows
orders: ~1% missing coupon_id; ~0.25% duplicated rows; rare net_amount outliers
order_items: ~0.2% duplicated rows; rare bulk-qty anomalies
payments: ~1% inconsistent casing in payment_status; ~0.3% duplicated rows; CANCELLED_PAYMENT_FAILED orders exist
shipments: ~1% inconsistent casing in shipment_status; ~0.2% duplicated rows; COD RTO clusters exist
refunds: ~0.7% missing refund_reason; ~1% inconsistent casing in refund_status; ~0.25% duplicated rows
notes: Fraud/anomaly patterns are embedded via latent user risk profiles: coupon_abuser, card_tester, rto_prone, high_refunder.
Device_id and pincode reuse clusters are embedded to enable investigation features.
Stock-like censoring isn't used here; anomalies are behavioral + transactional.
